etapas.tutorial: The display indicates the start of the automatic calibration (Auto Setup). Wait for processing.
Calibration error: insufficient stroke. The calibration was aborted by the system.
Uncouple or manually force the rotary valve shaft to ensure a rotation greater than 30°.
Position successfully corrected. The green LED confirms the valve opening and the system is ready.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
